default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting for GrowthX Labs' content strategy engagement with Metadata.io](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Metadata.io seeks to establish a strong organic foundation, focusing on high-converting content for B2B demand gen](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Current content strategy is non-existent; previous efforts didn't yield desired results](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs to deliver \~25-30 pieces of content monthly (50,000 words), balancing new articles and refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Key focus areas: B2B lead gen, activating B2B on Facebook/Instagram, consolidating ad channels, and improving organic conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Topics

### Metadata.io's Current Situation and Goals

  - [Organic traffic foundation needs rebuilding; missing basics like meta descriptions and title tags](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Primary company goals: GRR (Gross Retention Rate) and Services Revenue growth](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Target metrics: lead volume, demos booked, and strong organic conversion rates (aiming for 5%+)](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [ICP: B2B companies with $30k+ monthly ad spend, typically enterprise-level with marketing teams](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)

### Content Strategy Approach

  - [GrowthX Labs to develop content strategy and roadmap within a week](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=2359.0)
  - [Will create a calibration article to align on style, tone, and substance](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=2365.0)
  - [Aiming for 25-30 articles per month (2000 words each), balancing new content and refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=2475.0)
  - [Focus on creating topical authority clusters, not just targeting high-intent keywords](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=2796.0)
  - [Content strategy to be presented in Airtable for review and approval](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=2852.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Main competitors: Success (for awareness), paid media agencies](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)
  - [Metadata differentiates with its full-suite offering and proprietary audience targeting](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=2723.0)

### ProServe Offering

  - [Similar to standard paid media agency services but more in-depth](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
  - [Weekly calls, support on recommendations, and leveraging Metadata's unique capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
  - [Clients often see better results with ProServe vs. self-service due to platform complexity](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)

### Access and Review Process

  - [GrowthX Labs needs access to Google Search Console, WordPress CMS, and ideally HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=2902.0)
  - [Anthony won't review every piece of content but will periodically check and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=2724.0)
  - <Team@growthxlabs.com> to be given necessary access for content creation and publishing

## Next Steps

  - [Anthony to provide access to Google Analytics 4, Search Console, and coordinate CMS/HubSpot access](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=3011.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs to send meeting recording, notes, and action items](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=2872.0)
  - [Schedule weekly cadence meeting (Wednesday or Thursday)](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=2888.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs to develop and present content strategy and roadmap next week](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=2359.0)
  - [Create and review calibration article to align on content direction](https://fathom.video/share/23SeeVeU2ij9bkNEjtxGoj1y1cJMCxyK?tab=summary&timestamp=2365.0)

action_items.description: Send recordings (sales calls, ProServe presentations), latest pitch deck, baseline metrics (lead sources, conversion rates), current ICP info to team@growthxlabs.com
Schedule 5-min CMS walkthrough session; coordinate time for next week's 45-min content strategy review
Send meeting recording, notes, action items to Anthony
Grant access to Google Search Console, GA4, HubSpot, WordPress CMS for team@growthxlabs.com; confirm CMS publish permissions
